name: elastic-sense
description: Elastic workflows for Claude Code with Agent Builder as the primary mode and a deprecated legacy fallback.

use_legacy_direct_mode.title: Use Local Legacy MCP Fallback
use_legacy_direct_mode.description: Runs the deprecated Elasticsearch MCP server locally through Docker. Use only if your Kibana deployment does not expose the Agent Builder MCP endpoint.

elastic_mcp_url.title: Elastic MCP URL
elastic_mcp_url.description: URL of the MCP endpoint already exposed by Kibana Agent Builder. This is the recommended remote mode. Ignored when legacy direct mode is enabled.

elastic_api_key.title: Elastic API Key
elastic_api_key.description: Elastic API key. In Agent Builder mode it needs Kibana Agent Builder privileges; in legacy direct mode it is sent directly to Elasticsearch.

legacy_es_url.title: Legacy Elasticsearch URL
legacy_es_url.description: Direct Elasticsearch URL used only when legacy direct mode is enabled.

legacy_es_ssl_skip_verify.title: Legacy Skip TLS Verification
legacy_es_ssl_skip_verify.description: Only used in legacy direct mode. Enable true only for development or controlled environments with invalid certificates.
